= [[Treasure Collection]] =
Icons for the [[Treasure Collection]] like [[Treasure_Collection#Treasure_Maps|Treasure Maps]], [[Treasure_Collection#Collector_Scrolls|Collector Scrolls]], [[Treasure_Collection#Chests|Chests]], and [[Treasure_Collection#Species_Treasure|Species Treasure]].

= [[Treasure_Collection#Treasure_Maps|Treasure Maps]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Koryeon Treasure Map}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Kemetic Treasure Map}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Hellenic Treasure Map}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Bharata Treasure Map}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Rift Treasure Map}}
|}

= [[Treasure_Collection#Collector_Scrolls|Collector Scrolls]] = 	
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|ART Master Scroll|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|CIV Master Scroll|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Expert Scroll|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|FAME Master Scroll|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|FTH Master Scroll|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Master Scroll|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Novice Scroll|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|TECH Master Scroll|orange}}
|}

= [[Treasure_Collection#Chests|Chests]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Dragon Chest|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Demon Chest|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Divine Order Chest|yellow}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Divine Neutral Chest|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Divine Chaos Chest|red}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Time Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Evolution Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Soul Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Fungus Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Organ Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Tool Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Gear Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Club Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Nebula Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ad Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Wormhole Refiner}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Memetic Chest|orange}}
|}

= [[Treasure_Collection#Species_Treasure|Species Treasure]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Species Chest|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Dung Beetle Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Earthworm Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Goldfish Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Surf Clam Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Hamster Chest}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mantis Chest}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Current Species War Chest}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
